insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 3.8% (<10%) in FY2025
Thin profit margins — NPM 1.6% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 6.87x in FY2025

anomalies.message: Swung from profit to loss in FY2024 — net profit turned negative
Net profit fell -78.2% YoY in FY2023 — significant earnings deterioration
